underlying_goal: Build a comprehensive theme-switching framework for their Arch Linux setup that switches wallpapers, nvim themes, kitty, mako, starship, waybar, and other components using pre-made color configs extracted from nvim colorschemes
friction_detail: Multiple issues arose: lavender.nvim plugin had wrong repo URL, rofi theme files were missing causing waybar tool to break, waybar opened on wrong monitor, and the session hit token limits before fully resolving the last issues.
brief_summary: User wanted to build a unified theme switcher for their Arch setup with 8 themes; nvim plugins and theme configs were created but waybar integration remained broken when the session ended.
